title: Pestshield Fast Cooling and Soothing Spray for Irritation and Redness, 120ml
features: COOLING & SOOTHING: Pestshield Cooling and Soothing Pump Spray offers fast acting relief from irritation anywhere on the skin; offering convenience and easy use

FAST COOLING ACTION: Pestshield Cooling and Soothing Pump Spray is a great way to calm tenderness on the body quickly and easily; our formula contains peppermint oil which offers cooling properties to soothe irritation
PERFECT FOR TRAVEL: Pestshield Cooling and Soothing Pump Spray is in a small compact bottle making is easy to bring along on family travels, outdoor activities, picnics and camping
HOW TO USE: Spray onto desired areas of skin as needed; when applying to face spray a small amount into hands and apply evenly, taking care to avoid eyes and mouth; repeat if required
Do not use on sensitive areas; do not use on chapped or broken skin
description: Pestshield Cooling and Soothing Pump Spray offers fast acting relief from irritation anywhere on the skin. Offering convenience and easy use! Pestshield Cooling and Soothing Pump Spray is a great way to calm tenderness on the body quickly and easily. Our formula contains peppermint oil which offers cooling properties to soothe irritation. Pestshield Cooling and Soothing Pump Spray is in a small compact bottle making is easy to bring along on family travels, outdoor activities, picnics and camping! Spray onto desired areas of skin as needed. When applying to face spray a small amount into hands and apply evenly, taking care to avoid eyes and mouth. Repeat if required. Do not use on sensitive areas. Do not use on chapped or broken skin.
